Period.title: Period. Details
Period.description: A class to describe a period of time.

UBLExtensions.title: UBLExtensions
UBLExtensions.description: An optional set of extensions to the committee model

StartDate.title: Period. Start Date. Date
StartDate.description: The date on which this period begins.

StartTime.title: Period. Start Time. Time
StartTime.description: The time at which this period begins.

EndDate.title: Period. End Date. Date
EndDate.description: The date on which this period ends.

EndTime.title: Period. End Time. Time
EndTime.description: The time at which this period ends.

DurationMeasure.title: Period. Duration. Measure
DurationMeasure.description: The duration of this period, expressed as an ISO 8601 code.

DescriptionCode.title: Period. Description Code. Code
DescriptionCode.description: A description of this period, expressed as a code.

Description.title: Period. Description. Text
Description.description: A description of this period, expressed as text.
